% check a.php
a.php:17:1: $x is of type: string (DEBUG)
a.php:18:1: $y is of type: bool (DEBUG)

-- a.php --
<?php

class Foo
{
	protected string $check;

	public function check(): bool
	{
		return $this->check === 'OK';
	}
}

$foo = new Foo;
$x = $foo->check;
$y = $foo->check();

#debugType $x
#debugType $y
